figures.caption: Figure 2: Confusion matrix using the proposed StanceMoE architecture.

Table 1: Performance comparison of baseline models and the proposed StanceMoE on the held-out test set. “K-fold (mean ± std)” reports the mean and standard deviation of test performance across fold-specific models, while “weighted logit ensemble” is the final ensemble prediction obtained via logit averaging. Here, Acc = Accuracy, Pre = Precision, Rec = Recall, and F1 = F1-Score.
Table 2: Classwise ablation study of StanceMoE using weighted logit ensemble, showing the effect of removing individual expert modules.
Table 4: Overall K-fold and weighted ensemble ablation study on the test set.
Table 5: Representative genuine misclassification cases of StanceMoE. Different background colors are used for visual distinction.
Figure 1: Proposed Mixture-of-Experts architecture for actor-level stance detection.
